ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contestants" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contestant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contestant */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., baking, cooking) */,
  "entry_name" TEXT /* Name of the entry (e.g., dish, recipe) */,
  "entry_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the entry */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contestant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contestant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contestant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contestant's entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contestant's entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contestants_competition_type FOREIGN KEY ("competition_type") REFERENCES competition_types ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant being judged */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the judge */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank assigned by the judge */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round in which the score was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_scores_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_scores_round_number FOREIGN KEY ("round_number") REFERENCES rounds ("round_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., baking, cooking) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the judge was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the judge's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_types" (
  "competition_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition type (e.g., baking, cooking) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules for the competition type */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Judging criteria for the competition type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the competition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the contestant */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the contestant across all rounds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the leaderboard entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)
column_names: Name of the entry (e.g., dish, recipe)
Unique number assigned to the entry
Timestamp when the contestant's entry was created
Timestamp of the last update to the contestant's entry
